response.original_title: 寝取らせ串刺し輪姦 愛する妻を深奥まで犯し尽くして下さい―。
response.overview: I could never tell my wife this before. My desire for my beloved Nao to be gang-raped by strangers... But I couldn't continue our married life with this thought. That's why I confessed it to her. Nao was bewildered by my confession, but she offered herself up for me. My wife, surrounded by men, having her mouth and vagina violated... It was a sight that could only be described as "impaled," and the surreal scene gave me an abnormal thrill. And Nao gradually began to feel pleasure as well...
response.title: 寝取らせ串刺し輪姦 愛する妻を深奥まで犯し尽くして下さい―。
